chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.80 of 2022 [Bushra Khatoon & others v. Muhammad Abdullah & others] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of main case 3.For hg of CMA No.484/22 10.04.2025. Mr. Fayaz Ali Metlo, advocate for appellants. Mr. Muhammad Umar Lakhani, advocate for respondent No. 3. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for appellants submits that he would be satisfied if this Court puts the appellants at liberty to move a proper application before the trial Court in respect of property viz. Plot No.FL-I, Block-15, Gulistan-e-Johar, Karachi which through the impugned order has been excluded from the domain of the preliminary decree. The other side has no issue to it. Accordingly, with consent, this appeal is disposed of in the terms that if any application is filed by the appellants in respect of the aforesaid property with a prayer to include it in the preliminary decree, it may be entertained and decided by the trial Court in accordance with law. The appeal is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
